name: Mccall's Creole Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Very hot New Orleans-style sausage, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
1/2 lb Smoked sausage cut into 1/2-inch pieces
1 lb Medium shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine ham, sausages and onions; over medium heat, sauté 8 minutes or until onion is soft. Stir in rice, add green pepper, scallions, the boiling water, parsley, garlic, salt, thyme, paprika, and bay leaf. Mix well. Bring to boil.
2. Reduce heat to low. Cook jambalaya, covered, for 20 to 25 minutes or until rice is tender, adding shrimp the last 8 minutes. With a large fork, fluff rice and evenly distribute ingredients.
